title: Abyssal Baths
description:
You discover a secluded chamber.

Steam rises from bubbling pools of hot liquid that shifts colors with hypnotic rhythm. Barnacled growths hang from the ceiling, dripping viscous fluid that hisses and writhes when it touches the surface. The air feels heavy, laden with [blue]salt[/blue] and something [green]unmistakably organic[/green].

As you approach the edge of the largest pool, the liquid ripples. The waters bubble more intensely as if anticipating your entry.
notes:
[gold]Multi-stage Event:[/gold] This event features two distinct paths: immerse yourself in the dangerous pools or abstain.

[gold]Immerse Path:[/gold] Choosing to immerse triggers an action that [green]gains 2 Max HP[/green] and [red]deals damage[/red] (starting at 3). You then unlock repeated [gold]Linger[/gold] and [gold]Exit[/gold] options. Each linger repeats the same Max HP gain and damage, but the damage increases by 1 each time (sequence: 3 → 4 → 5 → 6 → 7 → 8 → 9 → 10 → 11 damage). The page description escalates through 9 stages reflecting your deteriorating state. If a linger would kill you, a death warning appears instead of the next stage description, allowing one final choice to linger dangerously or exit safely.

[gold]Abstain Path:[/gold] Immediately exit and heal 10 HP without entering the baths.

[gold]Mechanics:[/gold] All damage from this event is unblockable and unpowered. Max HP gain and damage occur simultaneously as part of each immerse/linger action, before the next choice is presented.
